race.comment: TOES IN FIRST (3) wound up strongly to just miss here last time over 1400m. Will appreciate the rise to the mile fourth-up and should be able to settle much closer from the inside draw. Ready to win again. BRUZANI (5) closed strongly into fourth here last time when resuming after settling a mile back. If they can utilise the draw this time and he's closer when they straighten, he can play a major role. BELLE FROM HELL (4) is knocking on the door after missing narrowly third-up at Balaklava. Near her peak now though could drift a long way back from the wide draw. Watch for her launching late if the tempo is genuine. ON THE MAP (10) did her best work late to finish third here last time. Likely to be running on again and will appreciate the added trip third-up. Don't underestimate.
